case_title: VILA BOWMAN VS. BLEYLE ELEVATOR, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BOWMAN, VILA AS TO DEFENDANT BLEYLE ELEVATOR, INC. THE KENMORE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE: WAIVER SERVED JUN-02-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THE KENMORE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOWMAN, VILA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BLEYLE ELEVATOR, INC. THE KENMORE THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT PLAINTIFF'S INJURY WAS CAUSED BY ANY ACT OR OMISSION OF DEFENDANT BLEYLE ELEVATOR, INC. PLAINTIFF'S REMEDY FOR A WORK RELATED INJURY IS AGAINST HER EMPLOYER THROUGH THE WORKER'S COMPENSATION SYSTEM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOWMAN, VILA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-01-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF VILA BOWMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BLEEYLE ELEVATOR, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY CURTIS BLEYLE, CEO. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT THE KENMORE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOWMAN, VILA AS TO DEFENDANT BLEYLE ELEVATOR, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SIGNED) SERVED JUN-05-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BLEYLE ELEVATOR, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BLEYLE ELEVATOR, INC.
